15. Get a list for hashes
Returns a list for hashes.
Base Command
cylance-protect-get-list

!cylance-protect-update-device-threats threat_id=ED01EBFBC9EB5BBEA545AF4D01BF5F1071661840480439C6E5BABE8E080E41AA

true
15. Get a list for hashes
Returns a list for hashes.
Base Command
cylance-protect-get-list
Input

Command Example
!cylance-protect-get-list listTypeId=0 page_size=4
Raw Output
{
"added":"2017-11-07T04:30:04",
"added_by":"3ff9b11e-b64e-4350-97ba-aeb0a099b8ee",
"av_industry":null,
"category":"",
name: cylance-protect-get-list

outputs.description: Timestamp when the file was added to the list File.AddedBy Tenant user ID who added the file to the list
outputs.name: File.Added

outputs.description: The score provided by the Anti-Virus industry File.Category The category for the list specified (for the Global Safe list only)
outputs.name: File.AvIndustry

outputs.description: Threat classification assigned by Cylance File.CylanceScore The Cylance score assigned to the threat
outputs.name: File.Classification

outputs.description: list type that the threat belongs to File.Md5 MD5 of the threat
outputs.name: File.ListType

outputs.description: SHA-256 of the threat File.Name Threat name
outputs.name: File.Sha256

outputs.description: The tested indicator DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
